description: Navigation family matrix - canonical nav patterns, component mapping and page shell connections for wayfinding parity

navigationFamilies.title: Primary Navigation
navigationFamilies.description: Uygulamanin ana navigasyonu: top bar, sidebar rail veya app shell header

navigationFamilies.title: Secondary Navigation
navigationFamilies.description: Sayfa icindeki tab grubu, breadcrumb veya section nav

navigationFamilies.title: Contextual Navigation
navigationFamilies.description: Dropdown menu, command palette ve context menu gibi anlik erisim yuzeyleri

navigationFamilies.title: Hierarchical Navigation
navigationFamilies.description: Tree view, nested sidebar ve multi-level navigation

navigationFamilies.title: Wizard / Step Navigation
navigationFamilies.description: Adim gostergesi, progress bar ve wizard flow yonetimi

navigationFamilies.title: Action Navigation
navigationFamilies.description: FAB, action bar ve quick-action surface'ler

crossFamilyPatterns.title: Breadcrumb + Tab Sync
crossFamilyPatterns.description: Breadcrumb ve tab selection ayni anda update edilir

crossFamilyPatterns.title: Global Command Palette
crossFamilyPatterns.description: Cmd+K ile tum navigation family'lere tek noktadan erisim

wayfindingRoles.global: Uygulamanin her yerinden erisilebilen ust-duzey navigasyon
wayfindingRoles.local: Mevcut sayfa veya section icindeki alt-navigasyon
wayfindingRoles.contextual: Sag-tik, shortcut veya komut tabanlı anlik erisim
wayfindingRoles.hierarchical: Agac yapisi veya ic ice menu ile derinlik navigasyonu
wayfindingRoles.action: Hizli aksiyon ve islem tetikleyici yuzeyler
